name: replaygear
description: ReplayGear — pre-owned games & consoles store (React frontend + Node/Express backend)

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix Back-end && npm install --prefix Front-end
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c magenta,cyan "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix Back-end && npm run build --prefix Front-end
